task_completion.description: Verify the creation of a Library Variable Group named 'PaymentService-Prod'
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for the Azure DevOps Library page showing a Variable Group with the exact name 'PaymentService-Prod'.

task_completion.description: Verify 'Gateway_Url' variable is added with the correct value
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for the variable 'Gateway_Url' with the value 'https://api.stripe.com/v1' in the 'PaymentService-Prod' variable group configuration.

task_completion.description: Verify 'Region_Code' variable is added with the correct value
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for the variable 'Region_Code' with the value 'us-east-1' in the 'PaymentService-Prod' variable group configuration.

task_completion.description: Verify 'Live_Secret_Key' variable is added and configured as a secret
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for the variable 'Live_Secret_Key' in the variable group. It must be marked as a secret, typically indicated by a padlock icon or an obscured value (e.g., '***').

task_completion.description: Verify 'azure-pipelines.yml' is updated to reference the variable group
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for the 'azure-pipelines.yml' file in the 'main' branch of the 'TailwindTraders' repository. It should contain a 'variables' section that includes '- group: PaymentService-Prod'.

integrity.description: Verify the agent used the Azure DevOps web interface to create the variable group
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots should show the Azure DevOps web portal (Pipelines > Library) being interacted with, rather than a terminal script executing API calls.

integrity.description: Verify the agent edited the actual repository file
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots should show the 'azure-pipelines.yml' file being edited in the Azure DevOps Repos interface, a proper IDE, or a terminal editor within the cloned repository, not a standalone text file.

integrity.description: Verify the secret value is not hardcoded in the YAML file
integrity.visual_evidence: The 'azure-pipelines.yml' file should only reference the variable group and must NOT contain the plaintext secret 'sk_live_51Mz92q92929492929'.

privileged_info_for_vlm: The expected variable group name is 'PaymentService-Prod'. The 'Gateway_Url' must be 'https://api.stripe.com/v1' (the verified Stripe API v1 base endpoint). The 'Region_Code' must be 'us-east-1' (a verified AWS region code). The secret variable must be named 'Live_Secret_Key' and its value should be obscured or marked as secret in the UI.
